LUK_17_35.normalized: two women will be grinding grain together one will be taken and the other left

LUK_17_37.speaker: Jesus
LUK_17_37.text: Wherever there is a carcass, there the vultures will gather.
LUK_17_37.normalized: wherever there is a carcass there the vultures will gather

LUK_18_2.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_2.text: In a certain town there was a judge who neither feared God nor respected men.
LUK_18_2.normalized: in a certain town there was a judge who neither feared god nor respected men

LUK_18_3.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_3.text: And there was a widow in that town who kept appealing to him, 'Give me justice against my adversary.
LUK_18_3.normalized: and there was a widow in that town who kept appealing to him give me justice against my adversary

LUK_18_4.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_4.text: For a while he refused, but later he said to himself, 'Though I neither fear God nor respect men,
LUK_18_4.normalized: for a while he refused but later he said to himself though i neither fear god nor respect men

LUK_18_5.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_5.text: yet because this widow keeps pestering me, I will give her justice. Otherwise, she will wear me out with her perpetual requests.
LUK_18_5.normalized: yet because this widow keeps pestering me i will give her justice otherwise she will wear me out with her perpetual requests

LUK_18_6.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_6.text: Listen to the words of the unjust judge.
LUK_18_6.normalized: listen to the words of the unjust judge

LUK_18_7.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_7.text: Will not God bring about justice for His elect who cry out to Him day and night? Will He delay in helping them?
LUK_18_7.normalized: will not god bring about justice for his elect who cry out to him day and night will he delay in helping them

LUK_18_8.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_8.text: I tell you, He will promptly carry out justice on their behalf. Nevertheless, when the Son of Man comes, will He find faith on earth?
LUK_18_8.normalized: i tell you he will promptly carry out justice on their behalf nevertheless when the son of man comes will he find faith on earth

LUK_18_10.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_10.text: Two men went up to the temple to pray. One was a Pharisee and the other a tax collector.
LUK_18_10.normalized: two men went up to the temple to pray one was a pharisee and the other a tax collector

LUK_18_11.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_11.text: The Pharisee stood by himself and prayed, 'God, I thank You that I am not like other men-swindlers, evildoers, adulterers-or even like this tax collector.
LUK_18_11.normalized: the pharisee stood by himself and prayed god i thank you that i am not like other men swindlers evildoers adulterers or even like this tax collector

LUK_18_12.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_12.text: I fast twice a week and pay tithes of all that I acquire.
LUK_18_12.normalized: i fast twice a week and pay tithes of all that i acquire

LUK_18_13.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_13.text: But the tax collector stood at a distance, unwilling even to lift up his eyes to heaven. Instead, he beat his breast and said, 'God, have mercy on me, a sinner!
LUK_18_13.normalized: but the tax collector stood at a distance unwilling even to lift up his eyes to heaven instead he beat his breast and said god have mercy on me a sinner

LUK_18_14.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_14.text: I tell you, this man, rather than the Pharisee, went home justified. For everyone who exalts himself will be humbled, but the one who humbles himself will be exalted.
LUK_18_14.normalized: i tell you this man rather than the pharisee went home justified for everyone who exalts himself will be humbled but the one who humbles himself will be exalted

LUK_18_16.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_16.text: Let the little children come to Me, and do not hinder them! For the kingdom of God belongs to such as these.
LUK_18_16.normalized: let the little children come to me and do not hinder them for the kingdom of god belongs to such as these

LUK_18_17.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_17.text: Truly I tell you, anyone who does not receive the kingdom of God like a little child will never enter it.
LUK_18_17.normalized: truly i tell you anyone who does not receive the kingdom of god like a little child will never enter it

LUK_18_19.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_19.text: Why do you call Me good? No one is good except God alone.
LUK_18_19.normalized: why do you call me good no one is good except god alone

LUK_18_20.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_20.text: You know the commandments: 'Do not commit adultery, do not murder, do not steal, do not bear false witness, honor your father and mother.
LUK_18_20.normalized: you know the commandments do not commit adultery do not murder do not steal do not bear false witness honor your father and mother

LUK_18_22.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_22.text: You still lack one thing: Sell everything you own and give to the poor, and you will have treasure in heaven. Then come, follow Me.
LUK_18_22.normalized: you still lack one thing sell everything you own and give to the poor and you will have treasure in heaven then come follow me

LUK_18_24.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_24.text: How hard it is for the rich to enter the kingdom of God!
LUK_18_24.normalized: how hard it is for the rich to enter the kingdom of god

LUK_18_25.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_25.text: Indeed, it is easier for a camel to pass through the eye of a needle than for a rich man to enter the kingdom of God.
LUK_18_25.normalized: indeed it is easier for a camel to pass through the eye of a needle than for a rich man to enter the kingdom of god

LUK_18_27.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_27.text: What is impossible with man is possible with God.
LUK_18_27.normalized: what is impossible with man is possible with god

LUK_18_29.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_29.text: Truly I tell you, no one who has left home or wife or brothers or parents or children for the sake of the kingdom of God
LUK_18_29.normalized: truly i tell you no one who has left home or wife or brothers or parents or children for the sake of the kingdom of god

LUK_18_30.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_30.text: will fail to receive many times more in this age-and in the age to come, eternal life.
LUK_18_30.normalized: will fail to receive many times more in this age and in the age to come eternal life

LUK_18_31.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_31.text: Look, we are going up to Jerusalem, and everything the prophets have written about the Son of Man will be fulfilled.
LUK_18_31.normalized: look we are going up to jerusalem and everything the prophets have written about the son of man will be fulfilled

LUK_18_32.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_32.text: He will be delivered over to the Gentiles and will be mocked and insulted and spit upon.
LUK_18_32.normalized: he will be delivered over to the gentiles and will be mocked and insulted and spit upon

LUK_18_33.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_33.text: They will flog Him and kill Him, and on the third day He will rise again.
LUK_18_33.normalized: they will flog him and kill him and on the third day he will rise again

LUK_18_41.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_41.text: What do you want Me to do for you?
LUK_18_41.normalized: what do you want me to do for you

LUK_18_42.speaker: Jesus
LUK_18_42.text: Receive your sight! Your faith has healed you.
LUK_18_42.normalized: receive your sight your faith has healed you

LUK_19_5.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_5.text: Zacchaeus, hurry down, for I must stay at your house today.
LUK_19_5.normalized: zacchaeus hurry down for i must stay at your house today

LUK_19_9.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_9.text: Today salvation has come to this house, because this man too is a son of Abraham.
LUK_19_9.normalized: today salvation has come to this house because this man too is a son of abraham

LUK_19_10.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_10.text: For the Son of Man came to seek and to save the lost.
LUK_19_10.normalized: for the son of man came to seek and to save the lost

LUK_19_12.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_12.text: A man of noble birth went to a distant country to lay claim to his kingship and then return.
LUK_19_12.normalized: a man of noble birth went to a distant country to lay claim to his kingship and then return

LUK_19_13.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_13.text: Beforehand, he called ten of his servants and gave them ten minas. 'Conduct business with this until I return,' he said.
LUK_19_13.normalized: beforehand he called ten of his servants and gave them ten minas conduct business with this until i return he said

LUK_19_14.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_14.text: But his subjects hated him and sent a delegation after him to say, 'We do not want this man to rule over us.
LUK_19_14.normalized: but his subjects hated him and sent a delegation after him to say we do not want this man to rule over us

LUK_19_15.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_15.text: When he returned from procuring his kingship, he summoned the servants to whom he had given the money, to find out what each one had earned.
LUK_19_15.normalized: when he returned from procuring his kingship he summoned the servants to whom he had given the money to find out what each one had earned

LUK_19_16.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_16.text: The first servant came forward and said, 'Master, your mina has produced ten more minas.
LUK_19_16.normalized: the first servant came forward and said master your mina has produced ten more minas

LUK_19_17.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_17.text: His master replied, 'Well done, good servant! Because you have been faithful in a very small matter, you shall have authority over ten cities.
LUK_19_17.normalized: his master replied well done good servant because you have been faithful in a very small matter you shall have authority over ten cities

LUK_19_18.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_18.text: The second servant came and said, 'Master, your mina has made five minas.
LUK_19_18.normalized: the second servant came and said master your mina has made five minas

LUK_19_19.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_19.text: And to this one he said, 'You shall have authority over five cities.
LUK_19_19.normalized: and to this one he said you shall have authority over five cities

LUK_19_20.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_20.text: Then another servant came and said, 'Master, here is your mina, which I have laid away in a piece of cloth.
LUK_19_20.normalized: then another servant came and said master here is your mina which i have laid away in a piece of cloth

LUK_19_21.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_21.text: For I was afraid of you, because you are a harsh man. You withdraw what you did not deposit and reap what you did not sow.
LUK_19_21.normalized: for i was afraid of you because you are a harsh man you withdraw what you did not deposit and reap what you did not sow

LUK_19_22.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_22.text: His master replied, 'You wicked servant, I will judge you by your own words. So you knew that I am a harsh man, withdrawing what I did not deposit and reaping what I did not sow?
LUK_19_22.normalized: his master replied you wicked servant i will judge you by your own words so you knew that i am a harsh man withdrawing what i did not deposit and reaping what i did not sow

LUK_19_23.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_23.text: Why then did you not deposit my money in the bank, and upon my return I could have collected it with interest?
LUK_19_23.normalized: why then did you not deposit my money in the bank and upon my return i could have collected it with interest

LUK_19_24.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_24.text: Then he told those standing by, 'Take the mina from him and give it to the one who has ten minas.
LUK_19_24.normalized: then he told those standing by take the mina from him and give it to the one who has ten minas

LUK_19_25.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_25.text: Master,' they said, 'he already has ten!
LUK_19_25.normalized: master they said he already has ten

LUK_19_26.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_26.text: He replied, ' I tell you that everyone who has will be given more; but the one who does not have, even what he has will be taken away from him.
LUK_19_26.normalized: he replied i tell you that everyone who has will be given more but the one who does not have even what he has will be taken away from him

LUK_19_27.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_27.text: And these enemies of mine who were unwilling for me to rule over them, bring them here and slay them in front of me.
LUK_19_27.normalized: and these enemies of mine who were unwilling for me to rule over them bring them here and slay them in front of me

LUK_19_30.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_30.text: Go into the village ahead of you, and as you enter it, you will find a colt tied there, on which no one has ever sat. Untie it and bring it here.
LUK_19_30.normalized: go into the village ahead of you and as you enter it you will find a colt tied there on which no one has ever sat untie it and bring it here

LUK_19_31.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_31.text: If anyone asks, 'Why are you untying it?' tell him, 'The Lord needs it.
LUK_19_31.normalized: if anyone asks why are you untying it tell him the lord needs it

LUK_19_40.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_40.text: I tell you, if they remain silent, the very stones will cry out.
LUK_19_40.normalized: i tell you if they remain silent the very stones will cry out

LUK_19_42.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_42.text: If only you had known on this day what would bring you peace! But now it is hidden from your eyes.
LUK_19_42.normalized: if only you had known on this day what would bring you peace but now it is hidden from your eyes

LUK_19_43.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_43.text: For the days will come upon you when your enemies will barricade you and surround you and hem you in on every side.
LUK_19_43.normalized: for the days will come upon you when your enemies will barricade you and surround you and hem you in on every side

LUK_19_44.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_44.text: They will level you to the ground-you and the children within your walls. They will not leave one stone on another, because you did not recognize the time of your visitation from God.
LUK_19_44.normalized: they will level you to the ground you and the children within your walls they will not leave one stone on another because you did not recognize the time of your visitation from god

LUK_19_46.speaker: Jesus
LUK_19_46.text: It is written: 'My house will be a house of prayer.' But you have made it 'a den of robbers.
LUK_19_46.normalized: it is written my house will be a house of prayer but you have made it a den of robbers

LUK_20_3.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_3.text: I will also ask you a question, Tell Me:
LUK_20_3.normalized: i will also ask you a question tell me

LUK_20_4.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_4.text: John's baptism-was it from heaven, or from men?
LUK_20_4.normalized: john s baptism was it from heaven or from men

LUK_20_8.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_8.text: Neither will I tell you by what authority I am doing these things.
LUK_20_8.normalized: neither will i tell you by what authority i am doing these things

LUK_20_9.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_9.text: A man planted a vineyard, rented it out to some tenants, and went away for a long time.
LUK_20_9.normalized: a man planted a vineyard rented it out to some tenants and went away for a long time

LUK_20_10.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_10.text: At harvest time, he sent a servant to the tenants to collect his share of the fruit of the vineyard. But the tenants beat the servant and sent him away empty-handed.
LUK_20_10.normalized: at harvest time he sent a servant to the tenants to collect his share of the fruit of the vineyard but the tenants beat the servant and sent him away empty handed

LUK_20_11.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_11.text: So he sent another servant, but they beat him and treated him shamefully, sending him away empty-handed.
LUK_20_11.normalized: so he sent another servant but they beat him and treated him shamefully sending him away empty handed

LUK_20_12.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_12.text: Then he sent a third, but they wounded him and threw him out.
LUK_20_12.normalized: then he sent a third but they wounded him and threw him out

LUK_20_13.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_13.text: What shall I do?' asked the owner of the vineyard. 'I will send my beloved son. Perhaps they will respect him.
LUK_20_13.normalized: what shall i do asked the owner of the vineyard i will send my beloved son perhaps they will respect him

LUK_20_14.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_14.text: But when the tenants saw the son, they discussed it among themselves and said, 'This is the heir. Let us kill him, and the inheritance will be ours.
LUK_20_14.normalized: but when the tenants saw the son they discussed it among themselves and said this is the heir let us kill him and the inheritance will be ours

LUK_20_15.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_15.text: So they threw him out of the vineyard and killed him. What then will the owner of the vineyard do to them?
LUK_20_15.normalized: so they threw him out of the vineyard and killed him what then will the owner of the vineyard do to them

LUK_20_16.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_16.text: He will come and kill those tenants and give the vineyard to others.
LUK_20_16.normalized: he will come and kill those tenants and give the vineyard to others

LUK_20_17.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_17.text: Then what is the meaning of that which is written: 'The stone the builders rejectedhas become the cornerstone'?
LUK_20_17.normalized: then what is the meaning of that which is written the stone the builders rejectedhas become the cornerstone

LUK_20_18.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_18.text: Everyone who falls on this stone will be broken to pieces, but he on whom it falls will be crushed.
LUK_20_18.normalized: everyone who falls on this stone will be broken to pieces but he on whom it falls will be crushed

LUK_20_24.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_24.text: Show Me a denarius. Whose image and inscription are on it?
LUK_20_24.normalized: show me a denarius whose image and inscription are on it

LUK_20_25.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_25.text: Give to Caesar what is Caesar's, and to God what is God's.
LUK_20_25.normalized: give to caesar what is caesar s and to god what is god s

LUK_20_34.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_34.text: The sons of this age marry and are given in marriage.
LUK_20_34.normalized: the sons of this age marry and are given in marriage

LUK_20_35.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_35.text: But those who are considered worthy to share in the age to come and in the resurrection from the dead will neither marry nor be given in marriage.
LUK_20_35.normalized: but those who are considered worthy to share in the age to come and in the resurrection from the dead will neither marry nor be given in marriage

LUK_20_36.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_36.text: In fact, they can no longer die, because they are like the angels. And since they are sons of the resurrection, they are sons of God.
LUK_20_36.normalized: in fact they can no longer die because they are like the angels and since they are sons of the resurrection they are sons of god

LUK_20_37.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_37.text: Even Moses demonstrates that the dead are raised, in the passage about the burning bush. For he calls the Lord 'the God of Abraham, the God of Isaac, and the God of Jacob.
LUK_20_37.normalized: even moses demonstrates that the dead are raised in the passage about the burning bush for he calls the lord the god of abraham the god of isaac and the god of jacob

LUK_20_38.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_38.text: He is not the God of the dead, but of the living, for to Him all are alive.
LUK_20_38.normalized: he is not the god of the dead but of the living for to him all are alive

LUK_20_41.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_41.text: How can it be said that the Christ is the Son of David?
LUK_20_41.normalized: how can it be said that the christ is the son of david

LUK_20_42.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_42.text: For David himself says in the book of Psalms: 'The Lord said to my Lord,"Sit at My right hand
LUK_20_42.normalized: for david himself says in the book of psalms the lord said to my lord sit at my right hand

LUK_20_43.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_43.text: until I make Your enemiesa footstool for Your feet.
LUK_20_43.normalized: until i make your enemiesa footstool for your feet

LUK_20_44.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_44.text: Thus David calls Him 'Lord.' So how can He be David's son?
LUK_20_44.normalized: thus david calls him lord so how can he be david s son

LUK_20_46.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_46.text: Beware of the scribes. They like to walk around in long robes, and they love the greetings in the marketplaces, the chief seats in the synagogues, and the places of honor at banquets.
LUK_20_46.normalized: beware of the scribes they like to walk around in long robes and they love the greetings in the marketplaces the chief seats in the synagogues and the places of honor at banquets

LUK_20_47.speaker: Jesus
LUK_20_47.text: They defraud widows of their houses, and for a show make lengthy prayers. These men will receive greater condemnation.
LUK_20_47.normalized: they defraud widows of their houses and for a show make lengthy prayers these men will receive greater condemnation

LUK_21_3.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_3.text: Truly I tell you, this poor widow has put in more than all the others.
LUK_21_3.normalized: truly i tell you this poor widow has put in more than all the others

LUK_21_4.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_4.text: For they all contributed out of their surplus, but she out of her poverty has put in all she had to live on.
LUK_21_4.normalized: for they all contributed out of their surplus but she out of her poverty has put in all she had to live on

LUK_21_6.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_6.text: As for what you see here, the time will come when not one stone will be left on another; every one will be thrown down.
LUK_21_6.normalized: as for what you see here the time will come when not one stone will be left on another every one will be thrown down

LUK_21_8.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_8.text: See to it that you are not deceived. For many will come in My name, claiming, 'I am He,' and, 'The time is near.' Do not follow them.
LUK_21_8.normalized: see to it that you are not deceived for many will come in my name claiming i am he and the time is near do not follow them

LUK_21_9.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_9.text: When you hear of wars and rebellions, do not be alarmed. These things must happen first, but the end is not imminent.
LUK_21_9.normalized: when you hear of wars and rebellions do not be alarmed these things must happen first but the end is not imminent

LUK_21_10.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_10.text: Nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom.
LUK_21_10.normalized: nation will rise against nation and kingdom against kingdom

LUK_21_11.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_11.text: There will be great earthquakes, famines, and pestilences in various places, along with fearful sights and great signs from heaven.
LUK_21_11.normalized: there will be great earthquakes famines and pestilences in various places along with fearful sights and great signs from heaven

LUK_21_12.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_12.text: But before all this, they will seize you and persecute you. On account of My name they will deliver you to the synagogues and prisons, and they will bring you before kings and governors.
LUK_21_12.normalized: but before all this they will seize you and persecute you on account of my name they will deliver you to the synagogues and prisons and they will bring you before kings and governors

LUK_21_13.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_13.text: This will be your opportunity to serve as witnesses.
LUK_21_13.normalized: this will be your opportunity to serve as witnesses

LUK_21_14.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_14.text: So make up your mind not to worry beforehand how to defend yourselves.
LUK_21_14.normalized: so make up your mind not to worry beforehand how to defend yourselves

LUK_21_15.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_15.text: For I will give you speech and wisdom that none of your adversaries will be able to resist or contradict.
LUK_21_15.normalized: for i will give you speech and wisdom that none of your adversaries will be able to resist or contradict

LUK_21_16.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_16.text: You will be betrayed even by parents and brothers and relatives and friends, and some of you will be put to death.
LUK_21_16.normalized: you will be betrayed even by parents and brothers and relatives and friends and some of you will be put to death

LUK_21_17.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_17.text: And you will be hated by everyone because of My name.
LUK_21_17.normalized: and you will be hated by everyone because of my name

LUK_21_18.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_18.text: Yet not even a hair of your head will perish.
LUK_21_18.normalized: yet not even a hair of your head will perish

LUK_21_19.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_19.text: By your patient endurance you will gain your souls.
LUK_21_19.normalized: by your patient endurance you will gain your souls

LUK_21_20.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_20.text: But when you see Jerusalem surrounded by armies, you will know that her desolation is near.
LUK_21_20.normalized: but when you see jerusalem surrounded by armies you will know that her desolation is near

LUK_21_21.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_21.text: Then let those who are in Judea flee to the mountains, let those in the city get out, and let those in the country stay out of the city.
LUK_21_21.normalized: then let those who are in judea flee to the mountains let those in the city get out and let those in the country stay out of the city

LUK_21_22.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_22.text: For these are the days of vengeance, to fulfill all that is written.
LUK_21_22.normalized: for these are the days of vengeance to fulfill all that is written

LUK_21_23.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_23.text: How miserable those days will be for pregnant and nursing mothers! For there will be great distress upon the land and wrath against this people.
LUK_21_23.normalized: how miserable those days will be for pregnant and nursing mothers for there will be great distress upon the land and wrath against this people

LUK_21_24.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_24.text: They will fall by the edge of the sword and be led captive into all the nations. And Jerusalem will be trodden down by the Gentiles, until the times of the Gentiles are fulfilled.
LUK_21_24.normalized: they will fall by the edge of the sword and be led captive into all the nations and jerusalem will be trodden down by the gentiles until the times of the gentiles are fulfilled

LUK_21_25.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_25.text: There will be signs in the sun and moon and stars, and on the earth dismay among the nations, bewildered by the roaring of the sea and the surging of the waves.
LUK_21_25.normalized: there will be signs in the sun and moon and stars and on the earth dismay among the nations bewildered by the roaring of the sea and the surging of the waves

LUK_21_26.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_26.text: Men will faint from fear and anxiety over what is coming upon the earth, for the powers of the heavens will be shaken.
LUK_21_26.normalized: men will faint from fear and anxiety over what is coming upon the earth for the powers of the heavens will be shaken

LUK_21_27.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_27.text: At that time they will see the Son of Man coming in a cloud with power and great glory.
LUK_21_27.normalized: at that time they will see the son of man coming in a cloud with power and great glory

LUK_21_28.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_28.text: When these things begin to happen, stand up and lift up your heads, because your redemption is drawing near.
LUK_21_28.normalized: when these things begin to happen stand up and lift up your heads because your redemption is drawing near

LUK_21_29.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_29.text: Look at the fig tree and all the trees.
LUK_21_29.normalized: look at the fig tree and all the trees

LUK_21_30.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_30.text: When they sprout leaves, you can see for yourselves and know that summer is near.
LUK_21_30.normalized: when they sprout leaves you can see for yourselves and know that summer is near

LUK_21_31.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_31.text: So also, when you see these things happening, know that the kingdom of God is near.
LUK_21_31.normalized: so also when you see these things happening know that the kingdom of god is near

LUK_21_32.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_32.text: Truly I tell you, this generation will not pass away until all these things have happened.
LUK_21_32.normalized: truly i tell you this generation will not pass away until all these things have happened

LUK_21_33.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_33.text: Heaven and earth will pass away, but My words will never pass away.
LUK_21_33.normalized: heaven and earth will pass away but my words will never pass away

LUK_21_34.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_34.text: But watch yourselves, or your hearts will be weighed down by dissipation, drunkenness, and the worries of life-and that day will spring upon you suddenly like a snare.
LUK_21_34.normalized: but watch yourselves or your hearts will be weighed down by dissipation drunkenness and the worries of life and that day will spring upon you suddenly like a snare

LUK_21_35.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_35.text: For it will come upon all who dwell on the face of all the earth.
LUK_21_35.normalized: for it will come upon all who dwell on the face of all the earth

LUK_21_36.speaker: Jesus
LUK_21_36.text: So keep watch at all times, and pray that you may have the strength to escape all that is about to happen and to stand before the Son of Man.
LUK_21_36.normalized: so keep watch at all times and pray that you may have the strength to escape all that is about to happen and to stand before the son of man

LUK_22_8.speaker: Jesus
LUK_22_8.text: Go and make preparations for us to eat the Passover.
LUK_22_8.normalized: go and make preparations for us to eat the passover

LUK_22_10.speaker: Jesus
LUK_22_10.text: When you enter the city, a man carrying a jug of water will meet you. Follow him to the house he enters,
LUK_22_10.normalized: when you enter the city a man carrying a jug of water will meet you follow him to the house he enters

LUK_22_11.speaker: Jesus
LUK_22_11.text: and say to the owner of that house, 'The Teacher asks: Where is the guest room, where I may eat the Passover with My disciples?
LUK_22_11.normalized: and say to the owner of that house the teacher asks where is the guest room where i may eat the passover with my disciples

LUK_22_12.speaker: Jesus
LUK_22_12.text: And he will show you a large upper room, already furnished. Make preparations there.
LUK_22_12.normalized: and he will show you a large upper room already furnished make preparations there

LUK_22_15.speaker: Jesus
LUK_22_15.text: I have eagerly desired to eat this Passover with you before My suffering.
LUK_22_15.normalized: i have eagerly desired to eat this passover with you before my suffering

LUK_22_16.speaker: Jesus
LUK_22_16.text: For I tell you that I will not eat it again until it is fulfilled in the kingdom of God.
LUK_22_16.normalized: for i tell you that i will not eat it again until it is fulfilled in the kingdom of god

LUK_22_17.speaker: Jesus
LUK_22_17.text: Take this and divide it among yourselves.
LUK_22_17.normalized: take this and divide it among yourselves

LUK_22_18.speaker: Jesus
LUK_22_18.text: For I tell you that I will not drink of the fruit of the vine from now on until the kingdom of God comes.
LUK_22_18.normalized: for i tell you that i will not drink of the fruit of the vine from now on until the kingdom of god comes

LUK_22_19.speaker: Jesus
LUK_22_19.text: This is My body, given for you; do this in remembrance of Me.

LUK_22_20.speaker: Jesus

LUK_22_21.text: Look! The hand of My betrayer is with Mine on the table.

LUK_22_22.text: Indeed, the Son of Man will go as it has been determined, but woe to that man who betrays Him.

LUK_22_25.normalized: the kings of the gentiles lord it over them and those in authority over them call themselves benefactors

LUK_22_26.speaker: Jesus
LUK_22_26.text: But you shall not be like them. Instead, the greatest among you should be like the youngest, and the one who leads like the one who serves.
LUK_22_26.normalized: but you shall not be like them instead the greatest among you should be like the youngest and the one who leads like the one who serves

LUK_22_27.speaker: Jesus
LUK_22_27.text: For who is greater, the one who reclines at the table or the one who serves? Is it not the one who reclines? But I am among you as one who serves.
LUK_22_27.normalized: for who is greater the one who reclines at the table or the one who serves is it not the one who reclines but i am among you as one who serves

LUK_22_28.speaker: Jesus
LUK_22_28.text: You are the ones who have stood by Me in My trials.
LUK_22_28.normalized: you are the ones who have stood by me in my trials

LUK_22_29.speaker: Jesus
LUK_22_29.text: And I bestow on you a kingdom, just as My Father has bestowed one on Me,
LUK_22_29.normalized: and i bestow on you a kingdom just as my father has bestowed one on me

LUK_22_30.speaker: Jesus
LUK_22_30.text: so that you may eat and drink at My table in My kingdom and sit on thrones, judging the twelve tribes of Israel.
LUK_22_30.normalized: so that you may eat and drink at my table in my kingdom and sit on thrones judging the twelve tribes of israel

LUK_22_31.text: Simon, Simon, Satan has asked to sift all of you like wheat.

LUK_22_32.text: But I have prayed for you, Simon, that your faith will not fail. And when you have turned back, strengthen your brothers.

LUK_22_34.speaker: Jesus
LUK_22_34.text: I tell you, Peter, the rooster will not crow today until you have denied three times that you know Me.
LUK_22_34.normalized: i tell you peter the rooster will not crow today until you have denied three times that you know me

LUK_22_35.speaker: Jesus
LUK_22_35.text: When I sent you out without purse or bag or sandals, did you lack anything?

LUK_22_36.text: Now, however, the one with a purse should take it, and likewise a bag; and the one without a sword should sell his cloak and buy one.

LUK_22_37.text: For I tell you that this Scripture must be fulfilled in Me: 'And He was numbered with the transgressors.' For what is written about Me is reaching its fulfillment.

LUK_22_52.normalized: have you come out with swords and clubs as you would against an outlaw

LUK_23_29.normalized: look the days are coming when people will say blessed are the barren women the wombs that never bore and breasts that never nursed

LUK_24_44.speaker: Jesus

JHN_3_16.normalized: for god so loved the world that he gave his one and only son that everyone who believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life

JHN_3_17.speaker: Jesus
JHN_3_17.text: For God did not send His Son into the world to condemn the world, but to save the world through Him.

JHN_3_18.speaker: Jesus

JHN_4_23.speaker: Jesus
JHN_4_23.text: But a time is coming and has now come when the true worshipers will worship the Father in spirit and in truth, for the Father is seeking such as these to worship Him.
JHN_4_23.normalized: but a time is coming and has now come when the true worshipers will worship the father in spirit and in truth for the father is seeking such as these to worship him

JHN_4_35.speaker: Jesus
JHN_4_35.text: Do you not say, 'There are still four months until the harvest'? I tell you, lift up your eyes and look at the fields, for they are ripe for harvest.

JHN_4_37.text: For in this case the saying 'One sows and another reaps' is true.

JHN_4_38.normalized: i sent you to reap what you have not worked for others have done the hard work and now you have taken up their labor

JHN_5_19.text: Truly, truly, I tell you, the Son can do nothing by Himself, unless He sees the Father doing it. For whatever the Father does, the Son also does.

JHN_5_24.text: Truly, truly, I tell you, whoever hears My word and believes Him who sent Me has eternal life and will not come under judgment. Indeed, he has crossed over from death to life.

JHN_5_30.speaker: Jesus

JHN_14_7.speaker: Jesus
JHN_14_7.text: If you had known Me, you would know My Father as well. From now on you do know Him and have seen Him.
JHN_14_7.normalized: if you had known me you would know my father as well from now on you do know him and have seen him

JHN_14_9.speaker: Jesus
JHN_14_9.text: Philip, I have been with you all this time, and still you do not know Me? Anyone who has seen Me has seen the Father. How can you say, 'Show us the Father'?
JHN_14_9.normalized: philip i have been with you all this time and still you do not know me anyone who has seen me has seen the father how can you say show us the father

JHN_14_10.speaker: Jesus
JHN_14_10.text: Do you not believe that I am in the Father and the Father is in Me? The words I say to you, I do not speak on My own. Instead, it is the Father dwelling in Me, performing His works.
JHN_14_10.normalized: do you not believe that i am in the father and the father is in me the words i say to you i do not speak on my own instead it is the father dwelling in me performing his works

JHN_14_11.speaker: Jesus
JHN_14_11.text: Believe Me that I am in the Father and the Father is in Me-or at least believe on account of the works themselves.
JHN_14_11.normalized: believe me that i am in the father and the father is in me or at least believe on account of the works themselves

JHN_14_12.speaker: Jesus
JHN_14_12.text: Truly, truly, I tell you, whoever believes in Me will also do the works that I am doing. He will do even greater things than these, because I am going to the Father.
JHN_14_12.normalized: truly truly i tell you whoever believes in me will also do the works that i am doing he will do even greater things than these because i am going to the father

JHN_14_13.speaker: Jesus
JHN_14_13.text: And I will do whatever you ask in My name, so that the Father may be glorified in the Son.
JHN_14_13.normalized: and i will do whatever you ask in my name so that the father may be glorified in the son

JHN_14_14.speaker: Jesus
JHN_14_14.text: If you ask Me for anything in My name, I will do it.
JHN_14_14.normalized: if you ask me for anything in my name i will do it

JHN_14_15.speaker: Jesus
JHN_14_15.text: If you love Me, you will keep My commandments.
JHN_14_15.normalized: if you love me you will keep my commandments

JHN_14_16.speaker: Jesus
JHN_14_16.text: And I will ask the Father, and He will give you another Advocate to be with you forever -
JHN_14_16.normalized: and i will ask the father and he will give you another advocate to be with you forever

JHN_14_17.speaker: Jesus
JHN_14_17.text: the Spirit of truth. The world cannot receive Him, because it neither sees Him nor knows Him. But you do know Him, for He abides with you and will be in you.
JHN_14_17.normalized: the spirit of truth the world cannot receive him because it neither sees him nor knows him but you do know him for he abides with you and will be in you

JHN_14_18.speaker: Jesus
JHN_14_18.text: I will not leave you as orphans; I will come to you.
JHN_14_18.normalized: i will not leave you as orphans i will come to you

JHN_14_19.speaker: Jesus
JHN_14_19.text: In a little while the world will see Me no more, but you will see Me. Because I live, you also will live.
JHN_14_19.normalized: in a little while the world will see me no more but you will see me because i live you also will live

JHN_14_20.speaker: Jesus
JHN_14_20.text: On that day you will know that I am in My Father, and you are in Me, and I am in you.
JHN_14_20.normalized: on that day you will know that i am in my father and you are in me and i am in you

JHN_14_21.speaker: Jesus
JHN_14_21.text: Whoever has My commandments and keeps them is the one who loves Me. The one who loves Me will be loved by My Father, and I will love him and reveal Myself to him.
JHN_14_21.normalized: whoever has my commandments and keeps them is the one who loves me the one who loves me will be loved by my father and i will love him and reveal myself to him

JHN_14_23.speaker: Jesus
JHN_14_23.text: If anyone loves Me, he will keep My word. My Father will love him, and We will come to him and make Our home with him.
JHN_14_23.normalized: if anyone loves me he will keep my word my father will love him and we will come to him and make our home with him

JHN_14_24.speaker: Jesus
JHN_14_24.text: Whoever does not love Me does not keep My words. The word that you hear is not My own, but it is from the Father who sent Me.
JHN_14_24.normalized: whoever does not love me does not keep my words the word that you hear is not my own but it is from the father who sent me

JHN_14_25.speaker: Jesus
JHN_14_25.text: All this I have spoken to you while I am still with you.
JHN_14_25.normalized: all this i have spoken to you while i am still with you

JHN_14_26.speaker: Jesus
JHN_14_26.text: But the Advocate, the Holy Spirit, whom the Father will send in My name, will teach you all things and will remind you of everything I have told you.
JHN_14_26.normalized: but the advocate the holy spirit whom the father will send in my name will teach you all things and will remind you of everything i have told you

JHN_14_27.speaker: Jesus
JHN_14_27.text: Peace I leave with you; My peace I give to you. I do not give to you as the world gives. Do not let your hearts be troubled; do not be afraid.
JHN_14_27.normalized: peace i leave with you my peace i give to you i do not give to you as the world gives do not let your hearts be troubled do not be afraid

JHN_14_28.speaker: Jesus
JHN_14_28.text: You heard Me say, 'I am going away, and I am coming back to you.' If you loved Me, you would rejoice that I am going to the Father, because the Father is greater than I.
JHN_14_28.normalized: you heard me say i am going away and i am coming back to you if you loved me you would rejoice that i am going to the father because the father is greater than i

JHN_14_29.speaker: Jesus
JHN_14_29.text: And now I have told you before it happens, so that when it does happen, you will believe.
JHN_14_29.normalized: and now i have told you before it happens so that when it does happen you will believe

JHN_14_30.speaker: Jesus
JHN_14_30.text: I will not speak with you much longer, for the prince of this world is coming, and he has no claim on Me.
JHN_14_30.normalized: i will not speak with you much longer for the prince of this world is coming and he has no claim on me

JHN_14_31.speaker: Jesus
JHN_14_31.text: But I do exactly what the Father has commanded Me, so that the world may know that I love the Father. Get up! Let us go on from here.
JHN_14_31.normalized: but i do exactly what the father has commanded me so that the world may know that i love the father get up let us go on from here

JHN_15_1.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_1.text: I am the true vine, and My Father is the keeper of the vineyard.
JHN_15_1.normalized: i am the true vine and my father is the keeper of the vineyard

JHN_15_2.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_2.text: He cuts off every branch in Me that bears no fruit, and every branch that does bear fruit, He prunes to make it even more fruitful.
JHN_15_2.normalized: he cuts off every branch in me that bears no fruit and every branch that does bear fruit he prunes to make it even more fruitful

JHN_15_3.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_3.text: You are already clean because of the word I have spoken to you.
JHN_15_3.normalized: you are already clean because of the word i have spoken to you

JHN_15_4.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_4.text: Remain in Me, and I will remain in you. Just as no branch can bear fruit by itself unless it remains in the vine, neither can you bear fruit unless you remain in Me.
JHN_15_4.normalized: remain in me and i will remain in you just as no branch can bear fruit by itself unless it remains in the vine neither can you bear fruit unless you remain in me

JHN_15_5.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_5.text: I am the vine and you are the branches. The one who remains in Me, and I in him, will bear much fruit. For apart from Me you can do nothing.
JHN_15_5.normalized: i am the vine and you are the branches the one who remains in me and i in him will bear much fruit for apart from me you can do nothing

JHN_15_6.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_6.text: If anyone does not remain in Me, he is like a branch that is thrown away and withers. Such branches are gathered up, thrown into the fire, and burned.
JHN_15_6.normalized: if anyone does not remain in me he is like a branch that is thrown away and withers such branches are gathered up thrown into the fire and burned

JHN_15_7.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_7.text: If you remain in Me and My words remain in you, ask whatever you wish, and it will be done for you.
JHN_15_7.normalized: if you remain in me and my words remain in you ask whatever you wish and it will be done for you

JHN_15_8.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_8.text: This is to My Father's glory, that you bear much fruit, proving yourselves to be My disciples.
JHN_15_8.normalized: this is to my father s glory that you bear much fruit proving yourselves to be my disciples

JHN_15_9.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_9.text: As the Father has loved Me, so have I loved you. Remain in My love.
JHN_15_9.normalized: as the father has loved me so have i loved you remain in my love

JHN_15_10.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_10.text: If you keep My commandments, you will remain in My love, just as I have kept My Father's commandments and remain in His love.
JHN_15_10.normalized: if you keep my commandments you will remain in my love just as i have kept my father s commandments and remain in his love

JHN_15_11.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_11.text: I have told you these things so that My joy may be in you and your joy may be complete.
JHN_15_11.normalized: i have told you these things so that my joy may be in you and your joy may be complete

JHN_15_12.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_12.text: This is My commandment, that you love one another as I have loved you.
JHN_15_12.normalized: this is my commandment that you love one another as i have loved you

JHN_15_13.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_13.text: Greater love has no one than this, that he lay down his life for his friends.
JHN_15_13.normalized: greater love has no one than this that he lay down his life for his friends

JHN_15_14.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_14.text: You are My friends if you do what I command you.
JHN_15_14.normalized: you are my friends if you do what i command you

JHN_15_15.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_15.text: No longer do I call you servants, for a servant does not understand what his master is doing. But I have called you friends, because everything I have learned from My Father I have made known to you.
JHN_15_15.normalized: no longer do i call you servants for a servant does not understand what his master is doing but i have called you friends because everything i have learned from my father i have made known to you

JHN_15_16.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_16.text: You did not choose Me, but I chose you. And I appointed you to go and bear fruit-fruit that will remain-so that whatever you ask the Father in My name, He will give you.
JHN_15_16.normalized: you did not choose me but i chose you and i appointed you to go and bear fruit fruit that will remain so that whatever you ask the father in my name he will give you

JHN_15_17.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_17.text: This is My command to you: Love one another.
JHN_15_17.normalized: this is my command to you love one another

JHN_15_18.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_18.text: If the world hates you, understand that it hated Me first.
JHN_15_18.normalized: if the world hates you understand that it hated me first

JHN_15_19.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_19.text: If you were of the world, it would love you as its own. Instead, the world hates you, because you are not of the world, but I have chosen you out of the world.
JHN_15_19.normalized: if you were of the world it would love you as its own instead the world hates you because you are not of the world but i have chosen you out of the world

JHN_15_20.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_20.text: Remember the word that I spoke to you: 'No servant is greater than his master.' If they persecuted Me, they will persecute you as well; if they kept My word, they will keep yours as well.
JHN_15_20.normalized: remember the word that i spoke to you no servant is greater than his master if they persecuted me they will persecute you as well if they kept my word they will keep yours as well

JHN_15_21.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_21.text: But they will treat you like this because of My name, since they do not know the One who sent Me.
JHN_15_21.normalized: but they will treat you like this because of my name since they do not know the one who sent me

JHN_15_22.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_22.text: If I had not come and spoken to them, they would not be guilty of sin. Now, however, they have no excuse for their sin.
JHN_15_22.normalized: if i had not come and spoken to them they would not be guilty of sin now however they have no excuse for their sin

JHN_15_23.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_23.text: Whoever hates Me hates My Father as well.
JHN_15_23.normalized: whoever hates me hates my father as well

JHN_15_24.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_24.text: If I had not done among them the works that no one else did, they would not be guilty of sin; but now they have seen and hated both Me and My Father.
JHN_15_24.normalized: if i had not done among them the works that no one else did they would not be guilty of sin but now they have seen and hated both me and my father

JHN_15_25.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_25.text: But this is to fulfill what is written in their Law: 'They hated Me without reason.
JHN_15_25.normalized: but this is to fulfill what is written in their law they hated me without reason

JHN_15_26.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_26.text: When the Advocate comes, whom I will send to you from the Father-the Spirit of truth who proceeds from the Father-He will testify about Me.
JHN_15_26.normalized: when the advocate comes whom i will send to you from the father the spirit of truth who proceeds from the father he will testify about me

JHN_15_27.speaker: Jesus
JHN_15_27.text: And you also must testify, because you have been with Me from the beginning.
JHN_15_27.normalized: and you also must testify because you have been with me from the beginning

JHN_16_1.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_1.text: I have told you these things so that you will not fall away.
JHN_16_1.normalized: i have told you these things so that you will not fall away

JHN_16_2.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_2.text: They will put you out of the synagogues. In fact, a time is coming when anyone who kills you will think he is offering a service to God.
JHN_16_2.normalized: they will put you out of the synagogues in fact a time is coming when anyone who kills you will think he is offering a service to god

JHN_16_3.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_3.text: They will do these things because they have not known the Father or Me.
JHN_16_3.normalized: they will do these things because they have not known the father or me

JHN_16_4.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_4.text: But I have told you these things so that when their hour comes, you will remember that I told you about them. I did not tell you these things from the beginning, because I was with you.
JHN_16_4.normalized: but i have told you these things so that when their hour comes you will remember that i told you about them i did not tell you these things from the beginning because i was with you

JHN_16_5.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_5.text: Now, however, I am going to Him who sent Me; yet none of you asks Me, 'Where are You going?
JHN_16_5.normalized: now however i am going to him who sent me yet none of you asks me where are you going

JHN_16_6.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_6.text: Instead, your hearts are filled with sorrow because I have told you these things.
JHN_16_6.normalized: instead your hearts are filled with sorrow because i have told you these things

JHN_16_7.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_7.text: But I tell you the truth, it is for your benefit that I am going away. Unless I go away, the Advocate will not come to you; but if I go, I will send Him to you.
JHN_16_7.normalized: but i tell you the truth it is for your benefit that i am going away unless i go away the advocate will not come to you but if i go i will send him to you

JHN_16_8.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_8.text: And when He comes, He will convict the world in regard to sin and righteousness and judgment:
JHN_16_8.normalized: and when he comes he will convict the world in regard to sin and righteousness and judgment

JHN_16_9.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_9.text: in regard to sin, because they do not believe in Me;
JHN_16_9.normalized: in regard to sin because they do not believe in me

JHN_16_10.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_10.text: in regard to righteousness, because I am going to the Father and you will no longer see Me;
JHN_16_10.normalized: in regard to righteousness because i am going to the father and you will no longer see me

JHN_16_11.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_11.text: and in regard to judgment, because the prince of this world has been condemned.
JHN_16_11.normalized: and in regard to judgment because the prince of this world has been condemned

JHN_16_12.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_12.text: I still have much to tell you, but you cannot yet bear to hear it.
JHN_16_12.normalized: i still have much to tell you but you cannot yet bear to hear it

JHN_16_13.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_13.text: However, when the Spirit of truth comes, He will guide you into all truth. For He will not speak on His own, but He will speak what He hears, and He will declare to you what is to come.
JHN_16_13.normalized: however when the spirit of truth comes he will guide you into all truth for he will not speak on his own but he will speak what he hears and he will declare to you what is to come

JHN_16_14.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_14.text: He will glorify Me by taking from what is Mine and disclosing it to you.
JHN_16_14.normalized: he will glorify me by taking from what is mine and disclosing it to you

JHN_16_15.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_15.text: Everything that belongs to the Father is Mine. That is why I said that the Spirit will take from what is Mine and disclose it to you.
JHN_16_15.normalized: everything that belongs to the father is mine that is why i said that the spirit will take from what is mine and disclose it to you

JHN_16_16.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_16.text: In a little while you will see Me no more, and then after a little while you will see Me.
JHN_16_16.normalized: in a little while you will see me no more and then after a little while you will see me

JHN_16_17.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_17.text: In a little while you will not see Me, and then after a little while you will see Me''Because I am going to the Father
JHN_16_17.normalized: in a little while you will not see me and then after a little while you will see me because i am going to the father

JHN_16_19.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_19.text: Are you asking one another why I said, 'In a little while you will not see Me, and then after a little while you will see Me'?
JHN_16_19.normalized: are you asking one another why i said in a little while you will not see me and then after a little while you will see me

JHN_16_20.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_20.text: Truly, truly, I tell you, you will weep and wail while the world rejoices. You will grieve, but your grief will turn to joy.
JHN_16_20.normalized: truly truly i tell you you will weep and wail while the world rejoices you will grieve but your grief will turn to joy

JHN_16_21.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_21.text: A woman has pain in childbirth because her time has come; but when she brings forth her child, she forgets her anguish because of her joy that a child has been born into the world.
JHN_16_21.normalized: a woman has pain in childbirth because her time has come but when she brings forth her child she forgets her anguish because of her joy that a child has been born into the world

JHN_16_22.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_22.text: So also you have sorrow now, but I will see you again and your hearts will rejoice, and no one will take away your joy.
JHN_16_22.normalized: so also you have sorrow now but i will see you again and your hearts will rejoice and no one will take away your joy

JHN_16_23.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_23.text: In that day you will no longer ask Me anything. Truly, truly, I tell you, whatever you ask the Father in My name, He will give you.
JHN_16_23.normalized: in that day you will no longer ask me anything truly truly i tell you whatever you ask the father in my name he will give you

JHN_16_24.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_24.text: Until now you have not asked for anything in My name. Ask and you will receive, so that your joy may be complete.
JHN_16_24.normalized: until now you have not asked for anything in my name ask and you will receive so that your joy may be complete

JHN_16_25.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_25.text: I have spoken these things to you in figures of speech. An hour is coming when I will no longer speak to you this way, but will tell you plainly about the Father.
JHN_16_25.normalized: i have spoken these things to you in figures of speech an hour is coming when i will no longer speak to you this way but will tell you plainly about the father

JHN_16_26.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_26.text: In that day you will ask in My name. I am not saying that I will ask the Father on your behalf.
JHN_16_26.normalized: in that day you will ask in my name i am not saying that i will ask the father on your behalf

JHN_16_27.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_27.text: For the Father Himself loves you, because you have loved Me and have believed that I came from God.
JHN_16_27.normalized: for the father himself loves you because you have loved me and have believed that i came from god

JHN_16_28.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_28.text: I came from the Father and entered the world. In turn, I will leave the world and go to the Father.
JHN_16_28.normalized: i came from the father and entered the world in turn i will leave the world and go to the father

JHN_16_32.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_32.text: Look, an hour is coming and has already come when you will be scattered, each to his own home, and you will leave Me all alone. Yet I am not alone, because the Father is with Me.
JHN_16_32.normalized: look an hour is coming and has already come when you will be scattered each to his own home and you will leave me all alone yet i am not alone because the father is with me

JHN_16_33.speaker: Jesus
JHN_16_33.text: I have told you these things so that in Me you may have peace. In the world you will have tribulation. But take courage; I have overcome the world!
JHN_16_33.normalized: i have told you these things so that in me you may have peace in the world you will have tribulation but take courage i have overcome the world

JHN_17_1.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_1.text: Father, the hour has come. Glorify Your Son, that Your Son may glorify You.
JHN_17_1.normalized: father the hour has come glorify your son that your son may glorify you

JHN_17_2.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_2.text: For You granted Him authority over all people, so that He may give eternal life to all those You have given Him.
JHN_17_2.normalized: for you granted him authority over all people so that he may give eternal life to all those you have given him

JHN_17_3.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_3.text: Now this is eternal life, that they may know You, the only true God, and Jesus Christ, whom You have sent.
JHN_17_3.normalized: now this is eternal life that they may know you the only true god and jesus christ whom you have sent

JHN_17_4.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_4.text: I have glorified You on earth by accomplishing the work You gave Me to do.
JHN_17_4.normalized: i have glorified you on earth by accomplishing the work you gave me to do

JHN_17_5.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_5.text: And now, Father, glorify Me in Your presence with the glory I had with You before the world existed.
JHN_17_5.normalized: and now father glorify me in your presence with the glory i had with you before the world existed

JHN_17_6.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_6.text: I have revealed Your name to those You have given Me out of the world. They were Yours; You gave them to Me, and they have kept Your word.
JHN_17_6.normalized: i have revealed your name to those you have given me out of the world they were yours you gave them to me and they have kept your word

JHN_17_7.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_7.text: Now they know that everything You have given Me comes from You.
JHN_17_7.normalized: now they know that everything you have given me comes from you

JHN_17_8.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_8.text: For I have given them the words You gave Me, and they have received them. They knew with certainty that I came from You, and they believed that You sent Me.
JHN_17_8.normalized: for i have given them the words you gave me and they have received them they knew with certainty that i came from you and they believed that you sent me

JHN_17_9.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_9.text: I ask on their behalf. I do not ask on behalf of the world, but on behalf of those You have given Me; for they are Yours.
JHN_17_9.normalized: i ask on their behalf i do not ask on behalf of the world but on behalf of those you have given me for they are yours

JHN_17_10.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_10.text: All I have is Yours, and all You have is Mine; and in them I have been glorified.
JHN_17_10.normalized: all i have is yours and all you have is mine and in them i have been glorified

JHN_17_11.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_11.text: I will no longer be in the world, but they are in the world, and I am coming to You. Holy Father, protect them by Your name, the name You gave Me, so that they may be one as We are one.
JHN_17_11.normalized: i will no longer be in the world but they are in the world and i am coming to you holy father protect them by your name the name you gave me so that they may be one as we are one

JHN_17_12.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_12.text: While I was with them, I protected and preserved them by Your name, the name You gave Me. Not one of them has been lost, except the son of destruction, so that the Scripture would be fulfilled.
JHN_17_12.normalized: while i was with them i protected and preserved them by your name the name you gave me not one of them has been lost except the son of destruction so that the scripture would be fulfilled

JHN_17_13.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_13.text: But now I am coming to You; and I am saying these things while I am in the world, so that they may have My joy fulfilled within them.
JHN_17_13.normalized: but now i am coming to you and i am saying these things while i am in the world so that they may have my joy fulfilled within them

JHN_17_14.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_14.text: I have given them Your word and the world has hated them. For they are not of the world, just as I am not of the world.
JHN_17_14.normalized: i have given them your word and the world has hated them for they are not of the world just as i am not of the world

JHN_17_15.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_15.text: I am not asking that You take them out of the world, but that You keep them from the evil one.
JHN_17_15.normalized: i am not asking that you take them out of the world but that you keep them from the evil one

JHN_17_16.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_16.text: They are not of the world, just as I am not of the world.
JHN_17_16.normalized: they are not of the world just as i am not of the world

JHN_17_17.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_17.text: Sanctify them by the truth; Your word is truth.

JHN_17_18.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_18.text: As You sent Me into the world, I have also sent them into the world.
JHN_17_18.normalized: as you sent me into the world i have also sent them into the world

JHN_17_19.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_19.text: For them I sanctify Myself, so that they too may be sanctified by the truth.
JHN_17_19.normalized: for them i sanctify myself so that they too may be sanctified by the truth

JHN_17_20.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_20.text: I am not asking on behalf of them alone, but also on behalf of those who will believe in Me through their message,
JHN_17_20.normalized: i am not asking on behalf of them alone but also on behalf of those who will believe in me through their message

JHN_17_21.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_21.text: that all of them may be one, as You, Father, are in Me, and I am in You. May they also be in Us, so that the world may believe that You sent Me.
JHN_17_21.normalized: that all of them may be one as you father are in me and i am in you may they also be in us so that the world may believe that you sent me

JHN_17_22.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_22.text: I have given them the glory You gave Me, so that they may be one as We are one -
JHN_17_22.normalized: i have given them the glory you gave me so that they may be one as we are one

JHN_17_23.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_23.text: I in them and You in Me-that they may be perfectly united, so that the world may know that You sent Me and have loved them just as You have loved Me.
JHN_17_23.normalized: i in them and you in me that they may be perfectly united so that the world may know that you sent me and have loved them just as you have loved me

JHN_17_24.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_24.text: Father, I want those You have given Me to be with Me where I am, that they may see the glory You gave Me because You loved Me before the foundation of the world.
JHN_17_24.normalized: father i want those you have given me to be with me where i am that they may see the glory you gave me because you loved me before the foundation of the world

JHN_17_25.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_25.text: Righteous Father, although the world has not known You, I know You, and they know that You sent Me.
JHN_17_25.normalized: righteous father although the world has not known you i know you and they know that you sent me

JHN_17_26.speaker: Jesus
JHN_17_26.text: And I have made Your name known to them and will continue to make it known, so that the love You have for Me may be in them, and I in them.
JHN_17_26.normalized: and i have made your name known to them and will continue to make it known so that the love you have for me may be in them and i in them

JHN_18_8.speaker: Jesus
JHN_18_8.text: I told you that I am He, So if you are looking for Me, let these men go.
JHN_18_8.normalized: i told you that i am he so if you are looking for me let these men go

JHN_18_9.speaker: Jesus
JHN_18_9.text: I have not lost one of those You have given Me.
JHN_18_9.normalized: i have not lost one of those you have given me

JHN_18_11.speaker: Jesus
JHN_18_11.text: Put your sword back in its sheath! Shall I not drink the cup the Father has given Me?
JHN_18_11.normalized: put your sword back in its sheath shall i not drink the cup the father has given me

JHN_18_20.speaker: Jesus
JHN_18_20.text: I have spoken openly to the world, I always taught in the synagogues and at the temple, where all the Jews come together. I said nothing in secret.
JHN_18_20.normalized: i have spoken openly to the world i always taught in the synagogues and at the temple where all the jews come together i said nothing in secret

JHN_18_21.speaker: Jesus
JHN_18_21.text: Why are you asking Me? Ask those who heard My message. Surely they know what I said.
JHN_18_21.normalized: why are you asking me ask those who heard my message surely they know what i said

JHN_18_23.speaker: Jesus
JHN_18_23.text: If I said something wrong, testify as to what was wrong. But if I spoke correctly, why did you strike Me?
JHN_18_23.normalized: if i said something wrong testify as to what was wrong but if i spoke correctly why did you strike me

JHN_18_34.speaker: Jesus
JHN_18_34.text: Are you saying this on your own, or did others tell you about Me?

JHN_18_36.speaker: Jesus
JHN_18_36.text: My kingdom is not of this world; if it were, My servants would fight to prevent My arrest by the Jews. But now My kingdom is not of this realm.
JHN_18_36.normalized: my kingdom is not of this world if it were my servants would fight to prevent my arrest by the jews but now my kingdom is not of this realm

JHN_18_37.speaker: Jesus
JHN_18_37.text: You say that I am a king, For this reason I was born and have come into the world, to testify to the truth. Everyone who belongs to the truth listens to My voice.

JHN_19_11.speaker: Jesus
JHN_19_11.text: You would have no authority over Me if it were not given to you from above. Therefore the one who handed Me over to you is guilty of greater sin.
JHN_19_11.normalized: you would have no authority over me if it were not given to you from above therefore the one who handed me over to you is guilty of greater sin

JHN_20_17.speaker: Jesus
JHN_20_17.text: Do not cling to Me, for I have not yet ascended to the Father. But go and tell My brothers, 'I am ascending to My Father and your Father, to My God and your God.

JHN_21_15.speaker: Jesus
JHN_21_15.text: Simon son of John, do you love Me more than these? Feed My lambs.

JHN_21_16.speaker: Jesus

JHN_21_18.speaker: Jesus
JHN_21_18.text: Truly, truly, I tell you, when you were young, you dressed yourself and walked where you wanted; but when you are old, you will stretch out your hands, and someone else will dress you and lead you where you do not want to go.

JHN_21_22.text: If I want him to remain until I return, what is that to you? You follow Me!
