JHN_21_23.text: If I want him to remain until I return, what is that to you?
JHN_21_23.normalized: if i want him to remain until i return what is that to you

REV_1_11.speaker: Jesus
REV_1_11.text: Write on a scroll what you see and send it to the seven churches: to Ephesus, Smyrna, Pergamum, Thyatira, Sardis, Philadelphia, and Laodicea.
REV_1_11.normalized: write on a scroll what you see and send it to the seven churches to ephesus smyrna pergamum thyatira sardis philadelphia and laodicea

REV_1_17.speaker: Jesus
REV_1_17.text: Do not be afraid. I am the First and the Last,
REV_1_17.normalized: do not be afraid i am the first and the last

REV_1_18.speaker: Jesus
REV_1_18.text: the Living One. I was dead, and behold, now I am alive forever and ever! And I hold the keys of Death and of Hades.
REV_1_18.normalized: the living one i was dead and behold now i am alive forever and ever and i hold the keys of death and of hades

REV_1_19.speaker: Jesus
REV_1_19.text: Therefore write down the things you have seen, the things that are, and the things that will happen after this.
REV_1_19.normalized: therefore write down the things you have seen the things that are and the things that will happen after this

REV_1_20.speaker: Jesus
REV_1_20.text: This is the mystery of the seven stars you saw in My right hand and of the seven golden lampstands: The seven stars are the angels of the seven churches, and the seven lampstands are the seven churches.
REV_1_20.normalized: this is the mystery of the seven stars you saw in my right hand and of the seven golden lampstands the seven stars are the angels of the seven churches and the seven lampstands are the seven churches

REV_2_1.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_1.text: To the angel of the church in Ephesus write: These are the words of Him who holds the seven stars in His right hand and walks among the seven golden lampstands.
REV_2_1.normalized: to the angel of the church in ephesus write these are the words of him who holds the seven stars in his right hand and walks among the seven golden lampstands

REV_2_2.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_2.text: I know your deeds, your labor, and your perseverance. I know that you cannot tolerate those who are evil, and you have tested and exposed as liars those who falsely claim to be apostles.
REV_2_2.normalized: i know your deeds your labor and your perseverance i know that you cannot tolerate those who are evil and you have tested and exposed as liars those who falsely claim to be apostles

REV_2_3.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_3.text: Without growing weary, you have persevered and endured many things for the sake of My name.
REV_2_3.normalized: without growing weary you have persevered and endured many things for the sake of my name

REV_2_4.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_4.text: But I have this against you: You have abandoned your first love.
REV_2_4.normalized: but i have this against you you have abandoned your first love

REV_2_5.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_5.text: Therefore, keep in mind how far you have fallen. Repent and perform the deeds you did at first. But if you do not repent, I will come to you and remove your lampstand from its place.
REV_2_5.normalized: therefore keep in mind how far you have fallen repent and perform the deeds you did at first but if you do not repent i will come to you and remove your lampstand from its place

REV_2_6.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_6.text: But you have this to your credit: You hate the works of the Nicolaitans, which I also hate.
REV_2_6.normalized: but you have this to your credit you hate the works of the nicolaitans which i also hate

REV_2_7.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_7.text: He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches. To the one who overcomes, I will grant the right to eat from the tree of life in the Paradise of God.
REV_2_7.normalized: he who has an ear let him hear what the spirit says to the churches to the one who overcomes i will grant the right to eat from the tree of life in the paradise of god

REV_2_8.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_8.text: To the angel of the church in Smyrna write: These are the words of the First and the Last, who died and returned to life.
REV_2_8.normalized: to the angel of the church in smyrna write these are the words of the first and the last who died and returned to life

REV_2_9.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_9.text: I know your affliction and your poverty-though you are rich! And I am aware of the slander of those who falsely claim to be Jews, but are in fact a synagogue of Satan.
REV_2_9.normalized: i know your affliction and your poverty though you are rich and i am aware of the slander of those who falsely claim to be jews but are in fact a synagogue of satan

REV_2_10.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_10.text: Do not fear what you are about to suffer. Behold, the devil is about to throw some of you into prison to test you, and you will suffer tribulation for ten days. Be faithful even unto death, and I will give you the crown of life.
REV_2_10.normalized: do not fear what you are about to suffer behold the devil is about to throw some of you into prison to test you and you will suffer tribulation for ten days be faithful even unto death and i will give you the crown of life

REV_2_11.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_11.text: He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches. The one who overcomes will not be harmed by the second death.
REV_2_11.normalized: he who has an ear let him hear what the spirit says to the churches the one who overcomes will not be harmed by the second death

REV_2_12.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_12.text: To the angel of the church in Pergamum write: These are the words of the One who holds the sharp, double-edged sword.
REV_2_12.normalized: to the angel of the church in pergamum write these are the words of the one who holds the sharp double edged sword

REV_2_13.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_13.text: I know where you live, where the throne of Satan sits, yet you hold fast to My name. You did not deny your faith in Me, even in the days of My faithful witness Antipas, who was killed among you where Satan dwells.
REV_2_13.normalized: i know where you live where the throne of satan sits yet you hold fast to my name you did not deny your faith in me even in the days of my faithful witness antipas who was killed among you where satan dwells

REV_2_14.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_14.text: But I have a few things against you, because some of you hold to the teaching of Balaam, who taught Balak to place a stumbling block before the Israelites so they would eat food sacrificed to idols and commit sexual immorality.
REV_2_14.normalized: but i have a few things against you because some of you hold to the teaching of balaam who taught balak to place a stumbling block before the israelites so they would eat food sacrificed to idols and commit sexual immorality

REV_2_15.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_15.text: In the same way, some of you also hold to the teaching of the Nicolaitans.
REV_2_15.normalized: in the same way some of you also hold to the teaching of the nicolaitans

REV_2_16.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_16.text: Therefore repent! Otherwise I will come to you shortly and wage war against them with the sword of My mouth.
REV_2_16.normalized: therefore repent otherwise i will come to you shortly and wage war against them with the sword of my mouth

REV_2_17.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_17.text: He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches. To the one who overcomes, I will give the hidden manna. I will also give him a white stone inscribed with a new name, known only to the one who receives it.
REV_2_17.normalized: he who has an ear let him hear what the spirit says to the churches to the one who overcomes i will give the hidden manna i will also give him a white stone inscribed with a new name known only to the one who receives it

REV_2_18.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_18.text: To the angel of the church in Thyatira write: These are the words of the Son of God, whose eyes are like a blazing fire and whose feet are like polished bronze.
REV_2_18.normalized: to the angel of the church in thyatira write these are the words of the son of god whose eyes are like a blazing fire and whose feet are like polished bronze

REV_2_19.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_19.text: I know your deeds-your love, your faith, your service, your perseverance-and your latest deeds are greater than your first.
REV_2_19.normalized: i know your deeds your love your faith your service your perseverance and your latest deeds are greater than your first

REV_2_20.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_20.text: But I have this against you: You tolerate that woman Jezebel, who calls herself a prophetess. By her teaching she misleads My servants to be sexually immoral and to eat food sacrificed to idols.
REV_2_20.normalized: but i have this against you you tolerate that woman jezebel who calls herself a prophetess by her teaching she misleads my servants to be sexually immoral and to eat food sacrificed to idols

REV_2_21.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_21.text: Even though I have given her time to repent of her immorality, she is unwilling.
REV_2_21.normalized: even though i have given her time to repent of her immorality she is unwilling

REV_2_22.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_22.text: Behold, I will cast her onto a bed of sickness, and those who commit adultery with her will suffer great tribulation unless they repent of her deeds.
REV_2_22.normalized: behold i will cast her onto a bed of sickness and those who commit adultery with her will suffer great tribulation unless they repent of her deeds

REV_2_23.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_23.text: Then I will strike her children dead, and all the churches will know that I am the One who searches minds and hearts, and I will repay each of you according to your deeds.
REV_2_23.normalized: then i will strike her children dead and all the churches will know that i am the one who searches minds and hearts and i will repay each of you according to your deeds

REV_2_24.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_24.text: But I say to the rest of you in Thyatira, who do not hold to her teaching and have not learned the so-called deep things of Satan: I will place no further burden upon you
REV_2_24.normalized: but i say to the rest of you in thyatira who do not hold to her teaching and have not learned the so called deep things of satan i will place no further burden upon you

REV_2_25.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_25.text: than to hold fast to what you have until I come.
REV_2_25.normalized: than to hold fast to what you have until i come

REV_2_26.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_26.text: And to the one who overcomes and continues in My work until the end, I will give authority over the nations.
REV_2_26.normalized: and to the one who overcomes and continues in my work until the end i will give authority over the nations

REV_2_27.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_27.text: He will rule them with an iron scepter and shatter them like pottery-just as I have received authority from My Father.
REV_2_27.normalized: he will rule them with an iron scepter and shatter them like pottery just as i have received authority from my father

REV_2_28.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_28.text: And I will give him the morning star.
REV_2_28.normalized: and i will give him the morning star

REV_2_29.speaker: Jesus
REV_2_29.text: He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches.
REV_2_29.normalized: he who has an ear let him hear what the spirit says to the churches

REV_3_1.speaker: Jesus
REV_3_1.text: To the angel of the church in Sardis write: These are the words of the One who holds the seven spirits of God and the seven stars. I know your deeds; you have a reputation for being alive, yet you are dead.
REV_3_1.normalized: to the angel of the church in sardis write these are the words of the one who holds the seven spirits of god and the seven stars i know your deeds you have a reputation for being alive yet you are dead

REV_3_2.speaker: Jesus
REV_3_2.text: Wake up and strengthen what remains, which is about to die; for I have found your deeds incomplete in the sight of My God.
REV_3_2.normalized: wake up and strengthen what remains which is about to die for i have found your deeds incomplete in the sight of my god

REV_3_3.speaker: Jesus
REV_3_3.text: Remember, then, what you have received and heard. Keep it and repent. If you do not wake up, I will come like a thief, and you will not know the hour when I will come upon you.
REV_3_3.normalized: remember then what you have received and heard keep it and repent if you do not wake up i will come like a thief and you will not know the hour when i will come upon you

REV_3_4.speaker: Jesus
REV_3_4.text: But you do have a few people in Sardis who have not soiled their garments, and because they are worthy, they will walk with Me in white.
REV_3_4.normalized: but you do have a few people in sardis who have not soiled their garments and because they are worthy they will walk with me in white

REV_3_5.speaker: Jesus
REV_3_5.text: Like them, he who overcomes will be dressed in white. And I will never blot out his name from the Book of Life, but I will confess his name before My Father and His angels.
REV_3_5.normalized: like them he who overcomes will be dressed in white and i will never blot out his name from the book of life but i will confess his name before my father and his angels

REV_3_6.speaker: Jesus
REV_3_6.text: He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches.
REV_3_6.normalized: he who has an ear let him hear what the spirit says to the churches

REV_3_7.speaker: Jesus
REV_3_7.text: To the angel of the church in Philadelphia write: These are the words of the One who is holy and true, who holds the key of David. What He opens no one can shut, and what He shuts no one can open.
REV_3_7.normalized: to the angel of the church in philadelphia write these are the words of the one who is holy and true who holds the key of david what he opens no one can shut and what he shuts no one can open

REV_3_8.speaker: Jesus
REV_3_8.text: I know your deeds. Behold, I have placed before you an open door, which no one can shut. I know that you have only a little strength, yet you have kept My word and have not denied My name.
REV_3_8.normalized: i know your deeds behold i have placed before you an open door which no one can shut i know that you have only a little strength yet you have kept my word and have not denied my name

REV_3_9.speaker: Jesus
REV_3_9.text: As for those who belong to the synagogue of Satan, who claim to be Jews but are liars instead, I will make them come and bow down at your feet, and they will know that I love you.
REV_3_9.normalized: as for those who belong to the synagogue of satan who claim to be jews but are liars instead i will make them come and bow down at your feet and they will know that i love you

REV_3_10.speaker: Jesus
REV_3_10.text: Because you have kept My command to persevere, I will also keep you from the hour of testing that is about to come upon the whole world, to test those who dwell on the earth.
REV_3_10.normalized: because you have kept my command to persevere i will also keep you from the hour of testing that is about to come upon the whole world to test those who dwell on the earth

REV_3_11.speaker: Jesus
REV_3_11.text: I am coming soon. Hold fast to what you have, so that no one will take your crown.
REV_3_11.normalized: i am coming soon hold fast to what you have so that no one will take your crown

REV_3_12.speaker: Jesus
REV_3_12.text: The one who overcomes I will make a pillar in the temple of My God, and he will never again leave it. Upon him I will write the name of My God, and the name of the city of My God (the new Jerusalem that comes down out of heaven from My God), and My new name.
REV_3_12.normalized: the one who overcomes i will make a pillar in the temple of my god and he will never again leave it upon him i will write the name of my god and the name of the city of my god the new jerusalem that comes down out of heaven from my god and my new name

REV_3_13.speaker: Jesus
REV_3_13.text: He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches.
REV_3_13.normalized: he who has an ear let him hear what the spirit says to the churches

REV_3_14.speaker: Jesus
REV_3_14.text: To the angel of the church in Laodicea write: These are the words of the Amen, the faithful and true Witness, the Originator of God's creation.
REV_3_14.normalized: to the angel of the church in laodicea write these are the words of the amen the faithful and true witness the originator of god s creation

REV_3_15.speaker: Jesus
REV_3_15.text: I know your deeds; you are neither cold nor hot. How I wish you were one or the other!
REV_3_15.normalized: i know your deeds you are neither cold nor hot how i wish you were one or the other

REV_3_16.speaker: Jesus
REV_3_16.text: So because you are lukewarm-neither hot nor cold-I am about to vomit you out of My mouth!
REV_3_16.normalized: so because you are lukewarm neither hot nor cold i am about to vomit you out of my mouth

REV_3_17.speaker: Jesus
REV_3_17.text: You say, 'I am rich; I have grown wealthy and need nothing.' But you do not realize that you are wretched, pitiful, poor, blind, and naked.
REV_3_17.normalized: you say i am rich i have grown wealthy and need nothing but you do not realize that you are wretched pitiful poor blind and naked

REV_3_18.speaker: Jesus
REV_3_18.text: I counsel you to buy from Me gold refined by fire so that you may become rich, white garments so that you may be clothed and your shameful nakedness not exposed, and salve to anoint your eyes so that you may see.
REV_3_18.normalized: i counsel you to buy from me gold refined by fire so that you may become rich white garments so that you may be clothed and your shameful nakedness not exposed and salve to anoint your eyes so that you may see

REV_3_19.speaker: Jesus
REV_3_19.text: Those I love I rebuke and discipline. Therefore be earnest and repent.
REV_3_19.normalized: those i love i rebuke and discipline therefore be earnest and repent

REV_3_20.speaker: Jesus
REV_3_20.text: Behold, I stand at the door and knock. If anyone hears My voice and opens the door, I will come in and dine with him, and he with Me.
REV_3_20.normalized: behold i stand at the door and knock if anyone hears my voice and opens the door i will come in and dine with him and he with me

REV_3_21.speaker: Jesus
REV_3_21.text: To the one who overcomes, I will grant the right to sit with Me on My throne, just as I overcame and sat down with My Father on His throne.
REV_3_21.normalized: to the one who overcomes i will grant the right to sit with me on my throne just as i overcame and sat down with my father on his throne

REV_3_22.speaker: Jesus
REV_3_22.text: He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches.
REV_3_22.normalized: he who has an ear let him hear what the spirit says to the churches

REV_4_1.speaker: Jesus
REV_4_1.text: Come up here, and I will show you what must happen after these things.
REV_4_1.normalized: come up here and i will show you what must happen after these things

REV_16_15.speaker: Jesus
REV_16_15.text: Behold, I am coming like a thief. Blessed is the one who remains awake and clothed, so that he will not go naked and let his shame be exposed.
REV_16_15.normalized: behold i am coming like a thief blessed is the one who remains awake and clothed so that he will not go naked and let his shame be exposed

REV_22_7.speaker: Jesus
REV_22_7.text: Behold, I am coming soon. Blessed is the one who keeps the words of prophecy in this book.
REV_22_7.normalized: behold i am coming soon blessed is the one who keeps the words of prophecy in this book

REV_22_12.speaker: Jesus
REV_22_12.text: Behold, I am coming soon, and My reward is with Me, to give to each one according to what he has done.
REV_22_12.normalized: behold i am coming soon and my reward is with me to give to each one according to what he has done

REV_22_13.speaker: Jesus
REV_22_13.text: I am the Alpha and the Omega, the First and the Last, the Beginning and the End.
REV_22_13.normalized: i am the alpha and the omega the first and the last the beginning and the end

REV_22_16.speaker: Jesus
REV_22_16.text: I, Jesus, have sent My angel to give you this testimony for the churches. I am the Root and the Offspring of David, the bright Morning Star.
